name: @elizaos/plugin-hyperd
description: On-demand DeFi intelligence for elizaOS agents — wallet risk, token security, liquidation alerts, P&L, DEX quotes. Paid per-call in USDC on Base via x402. No API key, no signup.

HYPERD_API_BASE.description: Base URL for the hyperD API. Defaults to https://api.hyperd.ai.

HYPERD_BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY.description: 0x-prefixed 32-byte EVM private key for x402 micropayments. The wallet must hold USDC on Base.

HYPERD_MAX_USDC_PER_CALL.description: Hard cap on USDC payment authorized per call. Defaults to 0.25.
